Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: --{?ObjectId@} SELECT T0."DocEntry", T0."DocNum", T0."DocDate", T0."DocTime", T0."GroupNum" AS "PriceListNum", T0."Comments", T0."ObjType", T1."ListName" AS "PriceList" FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE]}" T0 LEFT OUTER JOIN OPLN T1 ON T0."GroupNum" = T1."ListNum" WHERE T0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@}

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: --{?ObjectId@} SELECT T0."ItemCode", T0."Dscription", T0."Quantity", T0."unitMsr", T0."LineTotal", T0."Currency", T0."PriceBefDi" FROM "{?$[BOY_TABLE_IDENTIFIER]}1" T0 WHERE T0."DocEntry" = {?DocKey@}

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition:
switch ( {?ObjectId@} = 59, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Varetilgang', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Wareneingang', True, 'Goods Receipt' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 60, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Vareafgang', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Warenausgang', True, 'Goods Issue' //Default English ), TRUE, 'UNKNOWN TYPE' )
if{@PriceListNumber} <> -1 then {@PriceListDescription} Else switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Sidste indkøbspris', True, 'Last Purchase Price' //Default English )
